'use strict' class Warning { constructor(text, opts = {}) { this.type = 'warning' this.text = text if (opts.node && opts.node.source) { let range = opts.node.rangeBy(opts) this.line = range.start.line this.column = range.start.column this.endLine = range.end.line this.endColumn = range.end.column } for (let opt in opts) this[opt] = opts[opt] } toString() { if (this.node) { return this.node.error(this.text, { index: this.index, plugin: this.plugin, word: this.word }).message } if (this.plugin) { return this.plugin + ': ' + this.text } return this.text } } module.exports = Warning Warning.default = Warning
